text.title: Staging Smoke Checklist by Surface Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are preconditions satisfied: separate staging, deliberate promotion, at least one user-facing surface?

conclusion.verdict: missing preconditions; if no staging, adopt staging-first; if no UI surface, use unit + contract tests

branch.question: How many user-facing surfaces does the system have?
Are all items in click-expect shape?

conclusion.verdict: rewrite goal items as click-expect with named target + observable

branch.question: Is the sign-off line typed (initials + UTC timestamp + build SHA)?

conclusion.verdict: add sign-off line; deploy script greps for it
if any item failed, abort promotion; else proceed

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
